description_long: This is a small, charming bungalow with a steeply pitched thatched gable roof, set on a grassy plot bordered by a rustic wooden fence. The front facade features a bright red door flanked by two symmetrically placed windows with blue shutters, and a stone path leads up to the entrance. The roof is constructed from overlapping wooden shingles, giving it a textured, natural appearance. The house is surrounded by lush grass, a stone walkway, and two stylized, low-poly trees on either side, enhancing its quaint, rural character. The side and rear views reveal the simplicity of the structure, with solid red gable ends and minimal window openings. The overall design suggests a cozy, single-story dwelling suitable for a suburban or park-like urban setting.
description: A quaint, single-story bungalow with a steep thatched roof, red door, blue-shuttered windows, and surrounded by grass, trees, and a rustic fence.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the full expanse of the thatched roof, wooden fence, and grassy yard with a tree on the right.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the red door, two blue-shuttered windows, stone path, and symmetrical landscaping with trees on both sides.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the length of the thatched roof, wooden fence, and a tree positioned close to the house.
description_view_3: Gable end view with a solid red wall, visible roof structure, and a tree on the left side.
